surface: NON-MATH letter-counting, ACCURACY-CONTROLLED: SFT keeps the model's OWN answer (not gold), only calibrates confidence -> isolates calibration from capability gain
verdict: CLEAN non-math calibration, accuracy-controlled -> resolves the earlier confound; row stays OPEN per contract. Keeping the model's own answers, ECE drops 0.533 -> 0.137/0.173/0.195 with accuracy ~CONSTANT (0.467 -> 0.50/0.53/0.567), and all 3 seeds' ΔECE 95% CI EXCLUDES 0. This removes the capability confound (accuracy did not change) AND the math-taxonomy-specific concern (non-math surface). Combined with the math surface (3 seeds, CIs exclude 0), W2's calibration-SFT lowers held-out ECE across TWO independent verifier-checkable surfaces. Awaiting maintainer sign-off for any promotion.
